issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing source/target files or GPU unavailability.
Skill assumes GPU acceleration and specific execution providers, limiting compatibility with non-GPU or non-CUDA environments.
Model file downloaded via wget without checksum verification.
Code cloned from GitHub without commit hash verification.
Packages installed via pip without specifying exact versions or verifying integrity.

scenarios.name: cli-video-gfpgan-swap
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric with a complete CLI command and output description, while Response A is incomplete and does not provide the required command.

scenarios.name: real-time-webcam-mouth-mask
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B provides no content.
